mapper.select: SELECT cl.*, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, i.title AS item_title FROM t_claim cl LEFT JOIN t_user u ON cl.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_item i ON cl.item_id = i.id WHERE cl.id = #{id}

SELECT cl.*, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, i.title AS item_title FROM t_claim cl LEFT JOIN t_user u ON cl.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_item i ON cl.item_id = i.id WHERE cl.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY cl.create_time DESC

SELECT cl.*, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, i.title AS item_title FROM t_claim cl LEFT JOIN t_user u ON cl.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_item i ON cl.item_id = i.id WHERE cl.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cl.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_claim (item_id, user_id, reason, contact_info, status, review_remark) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{userId}, #{reason}, #{contactInfo}, #{status}, #{reviewRemark})
